hero.title: Sunnat Ke Mutabiq Eid Manayein
hero.subtitle: Islami taleemat ki roshni mein Eid-ul-Fitr aur Eid-ul-Adha manane ki mukammal rehnumayi.

what_is_eid.title: Eid Kya Hai?
what_is_eid.desc: Islami tehwaaron ke haqeeqi maani, ahmiyat aur tareekh ko samjhein.

sunnah.title: Eid Ki Sunnatein
sunnah.desc: Nabi Kareem ﷺ ke Eid ke din ke masnoon aamaal ke baare mein jaaniyen.

prayer.title: Namaz-e-Eid Ka Tareeqa
prayer.desc: Eid ki namaz ada karne ka tafseeli tareeqa, takbeerat ke saath.

sadaqah.title: Sadaqat-ul-Fitr
sadaqah.desc: Namaz-e-Eid se pehle Sadaqat-ul-Fitr ada karne ke aham ahkaam aur masail.

dodont.title: Kya Karein aur Kya Nahi
dodont.desc: Eid ki taqreebat ko baabarkat banane ke liye kya karna chahiye aur kin cheezon se bachna chahiye.

checklist.title: Aapki Eid Ki Tayyari Ki Checklist

items.task2: Apne behtareen aur saaf kapde pehenna
items.task3: Taaq adad khajoorein khana (Eid-ul-Fitr ki subah)
items.task4: Namaz-e-Eid se pehle Sadaqat-ul-Fitr ada karna
items.task5: Namaz ke liye jaate hue raste mein Takbeerat-e-Eid padhna
items.task6: Eid ki namaz ba-jamaat ada karna
items.task8: Wapsi par doosra rasta ikhtiyar karna
items.task9: Ek doosre ko Eid ki mubarakbad dena

home.share_hub_desc: Download aur share karein ye beautiful reminders apne WhatsApp ya Instagram status par.
home.checklist_title: Aapki Eid Ki Tayyari Ki Checklist
home.checklist_desc: Apni progress par nazar rakhein jaise jaise aap Eid ke mubaarak din ki tayyari karte hain. Aapki saari progress auto-save hoti hai.
home.checklist_promo_desc: Saare tasks poore karein taake aapka Eid ka din Sunnat ke mutabiq behtareen guzre.

footer.desc: Quran-o-Sunnat ke mutabiq Eid manane ki mukammal rehnumayi.
footer.rights: © 2026 Eid Guide. Jumla huqooq mehfooz hain.

about.title: Eid Kya Hai?
about.subtitle: Islami Tehwaaron Ki Barkaat Ko Samajhna
about.content_p1: Lafz 'Eid' ka matlab hai khushi ka woh din jo har saal laut kar aaye. Islam mein do badi Eidein hain: Eid-ul-Fitr aur Eid-ul-Adha.
about.content_p2: Eid khushi, shukar guzari aur ibadat ka din hai. Yeh woh din hai jab duniya bhar ke musalman Allah ki be-shumar nematon aur rehmatoon ka shukar ada karne ke liye jama hote hain.
about.fitr_desc: Ramadan ke aakhir mein manayi jati hai, jo rozon ke mahine ke mukammal hone ki nishani hai. Yeh roze rakhne ki taufiq dene par Allah ka shukar ada karne ka din hai.
about.adha_desc: Qurbani ka tehwaar, jo Dhul-Hijjah ke mahine mein Hazrat Ibrahim (AS) ki Allah ki itaat mein apne bete ko qurban karne ki razamandi ki yaad mein manaya jata hai.

sunnah.title: Eid Ki Sunnatein
sunnah.subtitle: Nabi Kareem ﷺ Ke Eid Ke Din Ke Aamaal
sunnah.content_title: Eid Ke Din Ke Masnoon Aamaal

prayer.title: Namaz-e-Eid Ka Tareeqa
prayer.subtitle: Eid Ki Ba-Jamaat Namaz Ka Tafseeli Tareeqa

sadaqah.title: Sadaqat-ul-Fitr
sadaqah.subtitle: Roze Ka Wajib Sadaqah
sadaqah.content_p1: Sadaqat-ul-Fitr (ya Zakat-ul-Fitr) ek wajib sadaqah hai jo har musalman ko Eid-ul-Fitr ki namaz se pehle ada karna zaroori hai.

dodont.title: Kya Karein Aur Kya Nahi
dodont.subtitle: Eid Ke Din Islami Aadaab Ko Barqarar Rakhna

dos.item1: Doosron ke saath khushi aur musarrat ka izhaar karein.
dos.item2: Saaf suthre kapde pehnein, tarjeehan naye ya apne behtareen kapde.
dos.item3: Rishtedaaron aur doston se milein taake rishte mazboot hon.
dos.item4: Tohfe dein aur lein, khaas taur par bachon ko.
dos.item5: Ghareebon aur maskeenon ko yaad rakhein aur un mein khana aur sadaqah taqseem karein.
dos.item6: Un logon ko maaf kar dein jinhone aap ke saath zyadti ki ho aur toote hue rishtey jodein.
dos.item7: Saara din Takbeerat padh kar kasrat se Allah ki hamd-o-sana bayaan karein.

donts.item1: Eid ke din roza rakhna (yeh shar'an mana hai).
donts.item2: Taqreebat ki wajah se farz namazein (Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha) chhod dena.
donts.item3: Libas aur khane peene mein fuzool kharchi, hadd se tajawuz ya dikhawa karna.
donts.item4: Aise aazadana ikhtilaat se bachna jo Islami haya ke usoolon ke khilaf ho.
donts.item5: Najaiz mauseeqi sunna ya ghair Islami tafreehat mein mashghool hona.
donts.item6: Jashn ke dauran Allah ke zikr se ghafil ho jana.
donts.item7: Dil mein bughz rakhna aur doosron se sulah karne se inkaar karna.

revamped_home.hero_subtitle: Master har detail Eid celebration ka, spirit se lekar namaz ke tareeqe aur Sadaqah rules tak.
revamped_home.chapter1_desc: Eid ke maani, fazail, aur un sunnaton ko samjhein jo Eid ki ruhaniyat ko zahir karti hain.
revamped_home.chapter2_desc: Ba-jamaat Namaz-e-Eid ke ahkaam, tareeqa aur adayegi par mukammal guide.
revamped_home.chapter3_desc: Namaz-e-Eid se pehle diye jane wale sadaqe ki miqdar, eligibility aur ehmiyat ke bare mein janein.
revamped_home.chapter4_title: Chapter 4: Eid ki Riwayat aur Hikmat
revamped_home.chapter4_desc: Eid ke din ke mustahab aamal, mamnu umoor aur is mubarak din ki hikmat.

share_cards.greeting_content: Allah Ta'ala aapki aur aapke family ki har khushi ko qubool farmaye.
share_cards.sunnah_content: Ghusl, Ache Kapde, Khajoor, Sadaqah, Takbeerat aur Eid ki Namaz.
share_cards.takbeer_content: Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar, La ilaha illallah, Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar, walillahil hamd.
share_cards.charity_content: Zaroorat mando ki madad ke liye Eid ki Namaz se pehle apna Fitrana dena na bhoolein.

search.title: Search Guide
search.no_results: Search ke mutabiq koi topic nahi mila.

achievements.reached_end: Aap guide ke ikhtitam par pahunch gaye hain.
achievements.completed_chapters: Aapne Eid Guide ke saare 22 chapters kamyabi se mukammal kar liye hain.
achievements.unlock_cert_note: Apna official certificate unlock karne ke liye Eid ki checklist poori karein!

cert_content.title: Completion Certificate
cert_content.subtitle: OFFICIAL SUNNAH COMPANION
cert_content.body: Ye is baat ki tasdeeq hai ke aapne 22-Step Ultimate Eid Guide kamyabi se poora kiya hai aur Sunnat-ke-mutabiq Eid preparation checklist par amal kiya hai.
cert_content.footer: www.eid-guide.com | Empowering the Ummah with Knowledge

page0.title: Eid ki Raat (yaani Chand Raat) aur Khusoosi Ihtimam
page0.subtitle: Chand Raat Action Plan
page0.intro_message: Chand raat asal mein hamari eidi lene ki raat hai. Pura Ramadan humne roza rakha, tarawih padhi, zakat di, sadqa kiya aur Quran ki tilawat ki. Ab yeh woh raat hai jab hum Allah Ta'ala se umeed rakhte hain ke woh hamari tamam ibadat qubool farmaye aur humein iska ajar ata kare. Is liye is raat ko ghaflat mein zaya karne ke bajaye zyada se zyada ibadat karein.
page0.q1_question: Sawal: Chand raat mein ibadat ikhtiyar karne ki koi khusoosi fazilat hai?
page0.q1_answer: Jawab: Ji yaqeenan hai. Chunanche is raat mein qiyam karne ki khusoosi fazilat manqool hai. Darj zail hadees mulahiza karein.
page0.hadith_intro: Hazrat Abu Umamah (RA) se marwi hai ke Rasool Allah ﷺ ne irshad farmaya:
page0.hadith_arabic: "Man qaama laylatayil ‘eedain muhtasiban lillah lam yamut qalbuhu yawma tamootul quloob."
page0.hadith_translation: Jis ne Allah Ta'ala ki raza ki khatir apne nafs ka ihtisab karte hue Eid ki raaton mein qiyam kiya, to jis din (Qayamat ke din) khauf o dahshat ki wajah se logon ke dil murda ho jayenge, us ka dil murda nahi hoga.

actions.item1: Imaan ki hifazat ke liye dua karein.
actions.item8: Azab-e-qabr aur jahannum se bachne ki dua karein.
actions.item9: Ummate Muhammad ﷺ ke liye dua karein.
actions.item10: Walidain aur rishtedaron se maafi maangein.

page0.dua_arabic: Allahumma innaka afuwwun tuhibbul afwa fa'fu anni.
page0.note: Note: Agarche yeh zaeef hadees hai, lekin muhaddiseen ke nazdeek fazail ke bab mein iska zikr kiya ja sakta hai. Musalmano ki aksariyat 27vi shab ke baad bilkul ghaflat ikhtiyar kar leti hai aur qeemti auqat zaya ho jate hain, is liye Eid ki raat ko bhi khusoosi tor par ibadat ka ehtimam karna chahiye.

page1.title: Eid ul Fitr ka Bayan
page1.p1: Shariat ki janib se kai ahkaam aur izhar-e-masarrat aur izhar-e-shukar ke liye kai ayaam muqarrar hain. Inhi ayaam mein ek din Ramzan ul Mubarak ke ikhtitam par aata hai jise Eid ul Fitr kaha jata hai. Musalman is din Allah Ta'ala ka shukar ada karte hain ke us ne Ramzan ul Mubarak ki ibadat ki taufiq ata farmayi.
page1.p2: Eid ul Fitr ke din Musalman namaz-e-eid ada karte hain, sadaqa-e-fitr dete hain aur khushi ka izhar karte hain. Is din ache kapde pehenna, khushboo lagana aur aapas mein mubarakbad دینا mustahab hai.
page1.p3: Eid ke din Musalmano ko chahiye ke woh Allah Ta'ala ka shukar ada karein aur uski ita'at mein mazeed koshish karein. Is din ghareebon aur mohtaajon ka khayal rakhna chahiye taake woh bhi khushiyon mein shareek ho saken.
page1.p4: Chunanche neeche Eid ul Fitr ke fazail aur ahkaam bayan kiye jate hain.

page2.title: Eid ki Tareef
page2.subtitle: Eid ke bunyadi aamaal aur maani

list_items.item2: Eid ki khushi manana sunnat hai
list_items.item5: Khushi ke izhar ka din hona

page2.question: Sawal: Eid kise kehte hain?
page2.answer: Jawab: Eid khushi ke dobara laut aane ko kehte hain. Eid us din ko kaha jata hai jis din Allah Ta'ala ki ne'maton par khushi ka izhar kiya jaye aur uska shukar ada kiya jaye.
page2.quran_quote: وَلَا تُسْرِفُوا إِنَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ الْمُسْرِفِينَ
page2.hadith_text: Aur hadees shareef mein aata hai ke Rasulullah ﷺ ne farmaya:
page2.hadith_quote: “Har qaum ki ek eid hoti hai aur ye hamari eid hai.”

page3.title: Eid ke Din Khusoosi Ehtimam
page3.p1: Eid ke din (baaz ibadat) aur khusoosi ehtimam
page3.q1_question: Sawal: Ibadat ke ilawa Eid ke din aur kin umoor ka ehtimam karna chahiye?
page3.q1_answer: Jawab: Eid ke din ibadat ke ilawa neeche diye gaye umoor ka ehtimam karna chahiye.
page3.hadith_intro: Hazrat Abu Hurairah (RA) se riwayat hai ke Rasulullah ﷺ ne farmaya:
page3.hadith_arabic: "من قام لیلتی العیدین محتسباً لم یمت قلبہ یوم تموت القلوب"
page3.hadith_translation: “Jo shakhs Eid-ul-Fitr aur Eid-ul-Adha ki raat ibadat kare sawab ki niyyat se, uska dil us din nahi marega jis din logon ke dil murda ho jayenge.”
page3.note: Note: Agar mumkin ho to Eid ki raat ibadat mein guzarna chahiye taake Allah Ta’ala ki khaas rehmat hasil ho sake.
page3.q2_question: Sawal: Eid ke din kya padhna chahiye?
page3.q2_answer: Jawab: Eid ke din takbeerat aur azkar ka ehtimam karna chahiye aur Allah Ta’ala ki hamd o sana bayan karni chahiye.

page4.title: Eid ki Subah ki Sunnatein
page4.p1: Eid ke din subah jaldi uthna, ghusl karna, ache kapde pehenna aur khushboo lagana sunnat hai. Eid-ul-Fitr ke din namaz ke liye jaane se pehle kuch meetha khana mustahab hai, jaise khajoor waghera.
page4.p2: Rasulullah ﷺ Eid-ul-Fitr ke din namaz ke liye jaane se pehle kuch khajooren khaya karte the.
page4.h1_intro:
Hadees mein aata hai:

Hazrat Anas bin Malik (RA) farmate hain:
page4.h1_quote: “Rasulullah ﷺ Eid-ul-Fitr ke din namaz ke liye us waqt tak nahi jaate the jab tak kuch khajooren na kha lete.”
page4.h2_intro: Hazrat Abu Saeed Khudri (RA) farmate hain:
page4.h2_quote: “Rasulullah ﷺ Eid ki namaz se pehle koi namaz nahi padhte the.”

page5.title: Eid ka Roza aur Mustahabbat
page5.q1_question: Sawal: Kya Eid ke din roza rakhna jaiz hai?
page5.q1_answer: Jawab: Nahi, Eid-ul-Fitr aur Eid-ul-Adha ke din roza rakhna mana hai.
page5.hadith_intro: Hazrat Abu Saeed Khudri (RA) se riwayat hai:
page5.hadith_arabic: نَهَى النَّبِيُّ ﷺ عَنْ صَوْمِ يَوْمِ الْفِطْرِ وَيَوْمِ النَّحْرِ۔
page5.hadith_quote: “Nabi Kareem ﷺ ne Eid-ul-Fitr aur Eid-ul-Adha ke din roza rakhne se mana farmaya.”
page5.q2_question: Sawal: Eid-ul-Fitr ke din kaun kaun si sunnatein aur mustahabbat hain?
page5.q2_answer: Jawab: Eid-ul-Fitr ke din neeche di gayi sunnaton ka khayal rakhna chahiye:

page6.title: Eid ke din ke Adaab
page6.subtitle: Adaab jinka khayal rakhna chahiye
page6.q_question: Sawal: Eid ke din kaun se adaab ka khayal rakhna chahiye?
page6.q_answer: Jawab: Eid ke din neeche diye gaye adaab ka khayal rakhna chahiye:
page6.hadith_intro: Hazrat Abdullah bin Umar (RA) se riwayat hai:
page6.hadith_quote1: Rasulullah ﷺ Eid ke din Eidgah ki taraf paidal jaya karte the.
page6.hadith_quote2: Aur wapas aate waqt doosra rasta ikhtiyar farmate the.

page7.title: Eid ke din Mubarakbad dena
page7.q1_question: Sawal: Kya Eid ke din ek doosre ko mubarakbad dena theek hai?
page7.q1_answer: Jawab: Ji haan, Eid ke din ek doosre ko mubarakbad dena jaiz hai.
page7.hadith_intro: Sahaba-e-Kiram (RA) Eid ke din ek doosre ko ye alfaaz kehte the:
page7.hadith_translation: Yani Allah Ta’ala hum se aur aap se (neik aamal) qabool farmaye.
page7.scholar_note: Ulama-e-Kiram ne bhi Eid ke din mubarakbad dene ko jaiz qarar diya hai.
page7.p2: Eid ke din khushi ka izhar
page7.p2_desc1: Eid ke din khushi ka izhar karna chahiye aur apne ghar walon ke saath acha sulook karna chahiye.
page7.p2_desc2: Lekin is baat ka khayal rakhna chahiye ke khushi ke izhar mein koi ghalat ya gunah ka kaam na ho.

page8.title: Namaz-e-Eid ka hukm aur waqt
page8.q1_question: Sawal: Namaz-e-Eid ka kya hukm hai?
page8.p1_desc: Fuqaha-e-Ahnaf ke nazdeek Eid-ul-Fitr aur Eid-ul-Adha ki namaz wajib hai.
page8.hadith_intro: Hazrat Abdullah bin Abbas (RA) se riwayat hai ke Rasulullah ﷺ ne farmaya:
page8.hadith_desc: Namaz-e-Eid ki adaigi Musalmano ke liye ek aham ibadat hai jisme Musalmano ka ijtema hota hai.

page9.title: Namaz-e-Eid ki Rakaatein aur Takbeerein
page9.q1_question: Sawal: Namaz-e-Eid mein kitni rakaatein hoti hain?
page9.q1_answer: Jawab: Namaz-e-Eid do rakat hoti hai.
page9.p1_desc: Ye namaz jamaat ke saath ada ki jati hai aur is mein izafi takbeerein bhi kahi jati hain.
page9.hadith_intro: Hazrat Abdullah bin Umar (RA) se riwayat hai:
page9.hadith_quote: Rasulullah ﷺ Eid-ul-Fitr aur Eid-ul-Adha ki namaz do rakat padha karte the.
page9.q2_question: Sawal: Namaz-e-Eid mein kitni takbeerein hoti hain?
page9.q2_answer: Jawab: Namaz-e-Eid mein 6 zyada takbeerein hoti hain.
page9.p2_desc2: Aur doosri rakat mein bhi 3 takbeerein kahi jati hain

page10.title: Namaz-e-Eid padhne ka tareeqa
page10.subtitle: Namaz-e-Eid padhne ka tareeqa
page10.q_question: Sawal: Namaz-e-Eid kis tarah ada ki jati hai?
page10.q_answer: Jawab: Namaz-e-Eid do rakat hoti hai aur ye jamaat ke saath ada ki jati hai.
page10.rakah1: Pehli rakat mein Imam takbeer-e-tahrima keh kar haath baandh leta hai aur sana padhta hai. Uske baad 3 izafi takbeerein kahi jati hain. Har takbeer ke saath haath uthaye jate hain.
page10.rakah1_cont: Phir Imam Surah Fatiha aur koi doosri surah padhta hai aur ruku aur sajda kar ke pehli rakat mukammal karta hai.
page10.rakah2: Doosri rakat mein Surah Fatiha aur koi surah padhne ke baad 3 izafi takbeerein kahi jati hain, phir ruku kiya jata hai aur namaz mukammal ki jati hai.

page11.title: Namaz-e-Eid ke baad Khutba
page11.q1_question: Sawal: Kya namaz-e-Eid ke baad khutba diya jata hai?
page11.q1_answer: Jawab: Ji haan, namaz-e-Eid ke baad khutba diya jata hai.
page11.p1_desc: Rasulullah ﷺ Eid ki namaz ke baad khutba irshad farmate the aur logon ko naseehat karte the.
page11.hadith_intro: Hazrat Jabir bin Abdullah (RA) se riwayat hai:
page11.hadith_quote: Rasulullah ﷺ Eid ke din namaz padhne ke baad khade hue aur logon ko khutba diya.
page11.p2_desc: Khutba sunna sunnat hai aur Musalmano ko chahiye ke woh khutba khamoshi se sunein.

page12.title: Sadaqa-e-Fitr
page12.q1_answer: Jawab: Sadaqa-e-Fitr wo sadaqa hai jo Ramzan-ul-Mubarak ke ikhtitam par har sahib-e-nisab Musalman par wajib hota hai.
page12.p1_desc: Sadaqa-e-Fitr ada karne ka maqsad ye hai ke ghareeb aur mohtaj log bhi Eid ki khushiyon mein shareek ho saken.
page12.hadith_intro: Hazrat Abdullah bin Umar (RA) se riwayat hai:
page12.hadith_quote: Rasulullah ﷺ ne Sadaqa-e-Fitr farz qarar diya.
page12.p2_desc: Sadaqa-e-Fitr Eid ki namaz se pehle ada karna chahiye.

page13.title: Sadaqa-e-Fitr kis par wajib hai
page13.q1_question: Sawal: Sadaqa-e-Fitr kin logon par wajib hai?
page13.q1_answer: Jawab: Sadaqa-e-Fitr har us Musalman par wajib hai jo sahib-e-nisab ho.
page13.p1_desc1: Yani jis ke paas apni zarooriyat se zyada maal ho.
page13.p1_desc2: Har sahib-e-nisab shakhs par zaroori hai ke woh apni taraf se aur apne nabaligh bachon ki taraf se bhi Sadaqa-e-Fitr ada kare.
page13.hadith_intro: Hazrat Abdullah bin Umar (RA) se riwayat hai ke Rasulullah ﷺ ne farmaya:

page14.title: Sadaqa-e-Fitr ki Miqdaar
page14.q1_question: Sawal: Sadaqa-e-Fitr ki miqdaar kya hai?
page14.q1_answer: Jawab: Sadaqa-e-Fitr ki miqdaar ek Saa' hai.
page14.p1_desc1: Ek Saa' taqreeban chaar mud ke barabar hota hai.
page14.p1_desc2: Ye miqdaar gandum, jo, khajoor ya kishmish waghera mein se kisi cheez ki di ja sakti hai.
page14.hadith_intro: Hazrat Abdullah bin Umar (RA) se riwayat hai:
page14.hadith_quote: Rasulullah ﷺ ne Sadaqa-e-Fitr ek Saa' khajoor ya ek Saa' jo muqarrar farmaya.

page15.title: Sadaqa-e-Fitr kis ko diya jaye
page15.q1_question: Sawal: Sadaqa-e-Fitr kin logon ko diya ja sakta hai?
page15.q1_answer: Jawab: Sadaqa-e-Fitr un logon ko diya ja sakta hai jo zakat ke mustahiq hon.
page15.p1_desc: Yani ghareeb, miskeen aur mohtaj logon ko Sadaqa-e-Fitr diya ja sakta hai.
page15.quran_intro: Quran Majeed mein farmaya gaya hai:
page15.quran_translation: “Innamas sadaqaatu lil fuqara wal masakeen.” Yani sadaqat faqeeron aur miskeenon ke liye hain.
page15.p2_desc: Is liye Sadaqa-e-Fitr un logon ko dena chahiye jo waqai zarooratmand hon.

page16.title: Sadaqa-e-Fitr kab ada karna chahiye
page16.q1_question: Sawal: Sadaqa-e-Fitr kab ada karna chahiye?
page16.q1_answer: Jawab: Sadaqa-e-Fitr Eid-ul-Fitr ki namaz se pehle ada karna chahiye.
page16.p1_desc: Agar kisi ne Eid ki namaz ke baad Sadaqa-e-Fitr ada kiya to sadaqa to ada ho jayega lekin Sadaqa-e-Fitr ka asal sawab hasil nahi hoga.
page16.hadith_intro: Hazrat Abdullah bin Abbas (RA) se riwayat hai ke Rasulullah ﷺ ne farmaya:
page16.hadith_quote: “Jo shakhs namaz-e-Eid se pehle Sadaqa-e-Fitr ada kare to woh maqbool sadaqa hai aur jo namaz ke baad ada kare to woh aam sadaqat mein se ek sadaqa hai.”

page17.title: Sadaqa-e-Fitr ke Fawaid
page17.q1_question: Sawal: Sadaqa-e-Fitr dene ke kya fawaid hain?
page17.q1_answer: Jawab: Sadaqa-e-Fitr dene ke kai fawaid hain:
page17.p1_desc1: Ye rozon ki kotahiyon aur ghaltiyon ka kaffara banta hai.
page17.p1_desc2: Is se ghareeb aur mohtaj logon ki madad hoti hai.
page17.p1_desc3: Is ke zariye ghareeb log bhi Eid ki khushiyon mein shareek ho sakte hain.
page17.hadith_intro: Hazrat Abdullah bin Abbas (RA) se riwayat hai ke Rasulullah ﷺ ne farmaya:
page17.hadith_quote: “Sadaqa-e-Fitr rozedaar ko behooda baaton aur gunahon se paak karne ke liye hai aur miskeenon ke liye khane ka zariya hai.”

page18.title: Eid ke din Mustahab Aamal
page18.q1_question: Sawal: Eid ke din kaun se aamal mustahab hain?
page18.q1_answer: Jawab: Eid ke din neeche diye gaye aamal mustahab hain:
page18.hadith_quote: Eid ke din ghusl karna mustahab hai.

page19.title: Eid ke din Mamnu Umour
page19.q1_question: Sawal: Eid ke din kin baaton se bachna chahiye?
page19.q1_answer: Jawab: Eid ke din neeche diye gaye umoor se bachna chahiye:
page19.p2_desc: Musalmano ko chahiye ke Eid ke din khushi manayein lekin is baat ka khayal rakhein ke koi aisa kaam na karein jo Shariat ke khilaf ho.

page20.title: Eid ki Hikmat
page20.q1_question: Sawal: Eid manane ki hikmat kya hai?
page20.q1_answer: Jawab: Eid manane ki hikmat ye hai ke Musalman Allah Ta’ala ki ne’maton par khushi ka izhar karein aur uska shukar ada karein.
page20.p1_desc1: Ramzan-ul-Mubarak ke roze rakhne aur ibadat karne ke baad Allah Ta’ala ne Musalmano ko Eid ki khushi ata farmayi hai.
page20.p1_desc2: Eid Musalmano ke darmiyan mohabbat, bhai chara aur ittehad paida karne ka zariya bhi hai.
page20.p1_desc3: Is din Musalman ek doosre se milte hain, mubarakbad dete hain aur khushi ka izhar karte hain.

page21.title: Khulasa
page21.p1_desc1: Eid-ul-Fitr Musalmano ke liye khushi aur shukar ka din hai. Is din Musalman Allah Ta’ala ka shukar ada karte hain ke us ne Ramzan-ul-Mubarak ke roze rakhne aur ibadat karne ki taufiq ata farmayi.
page21.p1_desc2: Eid ke din namaz-e-Eid ada ki jati hai, Sadaqa-e-Fitr diya jata hai aur Musalman aapas mein mohabbat aur bhai chara ka izhar karte hain.
page21.p1_desc3: Islam hume ye taleem deta hai ke apni khushiyon mein ghareeb aur mohtaj logon ko bhi shareek karein.
page21.p1_desc4: Lehaza hume chahiye ke Eid ke din Allah Ta’ala ka shukar ada karein, neik aamal karein aur doosron ke saath acha sulook karein.

quiz.title: Sunnat Knowledge Quiz
quiz.subtitle: Apna certificate unlock karne ke liye ye छोटा sa quiz poora karein
quiz.status_pass: Bohat Khoob! Aapne Eid ki Sunnaton ko ache se samajh liya hai.
quiz.status_fail: Pareshan na hon! Guide ko dobara padhein aur phir se koshish karein.

questions.q: Eid ki raat (Chand Raat) ibadat karne ki kya fazilat hai?
options: Jis din logon ke dil marenge, us din aapka dil nahi marega

questions.q: Eid-ul-Fitr ki namaz ke liye jaane se pehle kya khana chahiye?
Namaz-e-Eid mein kitni extra Takbeerein hoti hain?
Sadaqat-ul-Fitr dene ka behtareen waqt kab hai?
Eidgah se wapsi par Sunnat tareeqa kya hai?
Kya Eid-ul-Fitr ke din roza rakhna allowed hai?
options: Sirf agar aapke Ramzan ke roze chhoot gaye hon

questions.q: Eid ke din nahane ki kya ehmiyat hai?
options: Ye bas ek normal nahan hai
Nahan sirf Hajiyon ke liye hai

questions.q: Eidgah jaate waqt kya zor se parhna chahiye?
Eid par common Sunnat greeting kya hai?

options: Har Muslim jis ke paas ek din ka khana ho

shawwal_tracker.desc: Apne Shawwal ke rozon ka track rakhein taaki Ramadan ki barkat baaki rahe.
shawwal_tracker.completed_msg: Mubarak! Aapne Shawwal ke 6 Sunnat roze poore kar liye hain.

fitrana_calc.title: Global Fitrana Calculator
fitrana_calc.desc: Apne region ke hisab se wazan ya currency mein Fitrana calculate karein.
fitrana_calc.note: *Note: Standard miqdar 2.5kg se 3kg anaaj hai. Currency rates local markets ke hisab se estimated hain.

eid_dua.title: Eid ki Sunnah Dua
eid_dua.subtitle: Sahaba-e-Kiram ki ek khoobsurat riwayat
eid_dua.translation: Allah hamari aur aap ki taraf se (neek kaam) qubool farmaye.
eid_dua.context: Jab Sahaba-e-Kiram Eid ke din milte thay, toh wo ek dusre ko ye dua dete thay.

takbeer_counter.title: Interactive Takbeer Counter
takbeer_counter.desc: Eid ki Takbeerat parhein aur apna count track karein.
takbeer_counter.takbeer_text: Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar, La ilaha illallah, Wallahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar, wa lillahil hamd

audio_player.track2_desc: Sheikh Mishary Rashid Al-Afasy ki awaaz mein
